case_title: CREST ROYAL APARTMENT VS CRAPSEY EDDYE DUVALL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAPSEY EDDYE DUVALL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,644.00 FILED BY CREST ROYAL APARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CRAPSEY EDDYE DUVALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREST ROYAL APARTMENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRAPSEY EDDYE DUVALL 1310 JONES ST.#703 SF CA 94109 PLTF.RESERVES THE RIGHT TO SUE FOR PAST DUE RENT AND DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO CRAPSEY EDDYE RETURNED MOVED NOT FORWARDABLE.
